scope: AgentLight supports observable AI agent status synchronization to ESP32-C3 hardware lights. Desktop pet UI, permission bubbles, dashboards, terminal focus, and automatic third-party config mutation are out of scope.

platforms.name: Claude Code
platforms.limitations: No automatic Claude configuration writes; permission handling remains in Claude Code.

platforms.name: Codex CLI
platforms.limitations: Session monitoring is read-only and depends on Codex local JSONL records.

platforms.name: Codex Desktop
platforms.limitations: Does not control Codex Desktop UI; only observes visible local Codex session records.

platforms.name: Antigravity CLI
platforms.limitations: Status synchronization only; Antigravity terminal handles permission menus.

platforms.name: Cursor Agent
platforms.limitations: User must merge the snippet into Cursor hook configuration.

platforms.name: CodeBuddy
platforms.limitations: No automatic CodeBuddy configuration writes; permission handling remains in CodeBuddy.

platforms.name: Kiro CLI
platforms.limitations: No automatic Kiro agent configuration creation.

platforms.name: Qwen Code
platforms.limitations: No automatic ~/.qwen/settings.json writes; permission handling remains in Qwen.

platforms.name: opencode
platforms.limitations: No automatic opencode plugin configuration writes.

platforms.name: Pi
platforms.limitations: Only synchronizes lifecycle/tool activity that can be connected through callbacks, logs, or wrappers.

platforms.name: OpenClaw
platforms.limitations: Status synchronization only; no permission bubbles or terminal focus.

platforms.name: Hermes Agent
platforms.limitations: Only synchronizes lifecycle/tool activity that can be connected through callbacks, logs, or wrappers.
